message.content:
[1/5] Source: git-inceptionlabs | Status: completed
Bemenderfer LLC is a software‑development and consulting firm headquartered in Indianapolis, IN.
Core focus: Providing ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) solutions and consulting, especially around Epicor ERP.
Key services: ERP consulting, ERP implementation, and a data‑portal offering to help businesses manage and analyze operational data.
Online presence: The company’s website highlights its mission to “empower businesses with advanced ERP solutions & expert consulting” and provides a “Get Started” portal for new clients.
Professional profile: On LinkedIn, Bemenderfer LLC is listed under “Software Development” and has a modest follower base, indicating a specialized niche in ERP and software services.
Overall, Bemenderfer LLC positions itself as a specialist partner for organizations looking to implement or optimize ERP systems, with a particular emphasis on Epicor technology.
Sources: 
1
, 
2
, 
3

Bemenderfer LLC is a custom software development and ERP consulting firm founded in 2008, headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana 
themanifest.com
.

Specializes in Epicor Kinetic/ERP consulting, including training, implementation, streamlining, and integration 
领英企业服务
www.crunchbase.com

www.bemenderfer.com
Key Details:
Size: Small team, approximately 5–10 employees 
rocketreach.co
www.signalhire.com
Leadership: Founded and led by David Bemenderfer, who has two decades of Epicor ERP consulting experience 
www.bemenderfer.com
Industries Served: Aerospace, automotive, food production, industrial manufacturing, component distribution, and more 
www.bemenderfer.com
Contact: bemenderfer.com | Phone: 317-643-2386 
www.signalhire.com
www.bemenderfer.com
Notable Approach:
The company emphasizes ethical consulting practices and long-term client relationships over short-term gains, with a focus on business process analysis to align solutions with client goals 
www.bemenderfer.com
.
BBB Accredited since March 2025, with 17 years in business 
www.bbb.org
.
If you're evaluating them for Epicor ERP services or custom integration work, their website (bemenderfer.com) offers case studies and a free consultation option. Let me know if you'd like help finding specific contact info or client references.
